Class: Color

bemap.Color(red, green, blue, alpha)

Base class for Color.

Constructor

new Color(red, green, blue, alpha)

Parameters:
Name Type Description
red int a number beetween 0 and 255 to define the red component of color.
green int a number beetween 0 and 255 to define the green component of color.
blue int a number beetween 0 and 255 to define the blue component of color.
alpha float a number between 0 and 1 to define the opacity (alpha) channel of color. 1 to full opacity and 0 to full transparency.
Source:
  • bemap-model/bemap-color.js, line 15
